name: Kyoto Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Kyoto Shogi (Tamiya, 1976): a tiny 5x5 Shogi whose signature is the flip. Every piece is a two-faced token (Tokin/Lance, Silver/Bishop, Gold/Knight, Pawn/Rook) that flips to its other face after every move, so each piece alternates roles turn by turn. The King never flips. Captured tokens may be dropped showing either face; there is no promotion zone. Win by checkmate.
